title: ‘I’ll happily wait’: Does delaying Social Security make sense for high earners like me?
summary: The article explores whether high earners should delay taking Social Security benefits, highlighting tax advantages in certain states where Social Security income is exempt from state income tax.

title: UN agency pauses Hormuz ship evacuation plan after first vessel attack under peace deal
summary: A UN agency paused its planned evacuation of ships from the Strait of Hormuz following an attack on a container vessel near Oman on Thursday. U.S. officials attributed the attack to Iran, raising tensions despite ongoing peace negotiations.
content: The pause follows a container ship being struck near the coast of Oman on Thursday, with a U.S. official saying that Iran was responsible for the attack.

zh.title: 联合国机构在和平协议下首艘船只遇袭后暂停霍尔木兹海峡撤离计划

title: SoftBank sinks 11% as Asia tech rout tracks declines in the U.S.

The decline is driven by mounting concerns about rising artificial intelligence infrastructure costs. This reflects growing investor anxiety about the economic viability of AI investments across the region.
content: SoftBank Group plunged, leading a broad selloff in Asian technology stocks amid mounting concerns over the rising cost of artificial intelligence infrastructure.
